title: Habibi, Run! Juha’s Bad Day
shortDescription: Survive the swarms, upgrade Juha, find his donkey, and escape!
fullDescription:
Juha had a plan. His donkey did not approve. The plan immediately went wrong.

Habibi, Run! is a fast portrait survival-action game packed with wild swarms, strange weapons, magical portals, and one extremely unimpressed donkey.

SURVIVE THE CHAOS
Guide Juha through waves of enemies while your weapons fight automatically. Keep moving, collect experience, and stay one step ahead of the swarm.

BUILD A RIDICULOUS ARSENAL
Level up and choose upgrades that change every run. Throw sandals, summon falcons, unleash sandstorms, and discover powerful combinations.

FIND THE DONKEY
Search each stage for Juha’s missing travel companion, bring him along, then reach the portal before the journey gets even worse.

TRAVEL THROUGH THREE WORLDS
Fight across the red sands of Wadi Rum, the green hills of Ajloun, and the old roads of Damascus.

Features:
• Quick portrait gameplay
• Upgrade choices that shape each run
• Three colorful stages
• Humorous characters and story moments
• Achievements and personal records
• Optional rewarded continue

One bad idea. Three worlds. Zero support from the donkey.
